title: New Relic Metric API Payload
description: Schema for metric data payloads submitted to the New Relic Metric API. Represents an array of metric batch objects, each containing a set of metrics and optional shared attributes applied to all metrics in the batch.

MetricDataObject.description: A container for a batch of related metrics with optional shared attributes

metrics.description: Array of individual metric data points in this batch

CommonBlock.description: Shared default values and attributes applied to all metrics in the batch

timestamp.description: Default Unix timestamp in milliseconds. Applied to all metrics unless overridden at the metric level.

interval.ms.description: Default measurement interval in milliseconds. Required for count and summary metric types.

MetricDataPoint.description: A single metric data point with type, value, and optional attributes

name.description: The metric name used for NRQL queries (e.g., cpu.utilization.percent)

type.description: The metric type determines how values are aggregated and interpreted

value.description: Metric value. Number for gauge and count; SummaryValue object for summary type.

oneOf.description: Numeric value for gauge or count metric types

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds. Overrides the common block timestamp for this metric.

interval.ms.description: Measurement interval in milliseconds. Required for count and summary types if not in common block.

SummaryValue.description: Aggregated statistical value for summary metric type

count.description: The number of individual measurements included in this summary

sum.description: The sum of all measurement values in this interval

min.description: The minimum individual measurement value in this interval

max.description: The maximum individual measurement value in this interval

AttributeMap.description: Key-value attribute pairs. Keys must not start with nr. (reserved prefix). Values can be strings (max 4096 chars), numbers, or booleans.
